query:
SELECT poNumber, deletedProducts, deletedTasks, deletedByName, createdAt
FROM purchase_order_deletion_logs
WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260508-01'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT poNumber, deletedProducts, deletedTasks, deletedByName, createdAt
FROM purchase_order_deletion_logs
WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260508-01'
